title: A Day at the Art Festival
article_text: An artist worked in a corner of the park, and a big crowd watched her. She felt the presence of many people, but there was no conflict because everyone was friendly. The entire park was full of energy, and the artist used a quick brush to create her painting. She used a net to catch some leaves for her art, and a secretary helped her organize the materials. The artist's defense of her work was strong because she believed in her ideas. A driver brought a big ball for a game, but the game changed because of a gas leak. The cook had to spread the news about the danger, and everyone moved to a safe camp. The shift in plans was sudden, but the audience stayed calm. The art festival had a nuclear theme, and the scale of the project was excellent. At the edge of the park, a child began to cry, but a friend came to lift her up.

sentences.en: An artist worked in a corner of the park, and a big crowd watched her.
sentences.zh: 一位艺术家在公园的一个角落工作，一大群人看着她。

words.eng_def: a place where two lines meet

sentences.en: She felt the presence of many people, but there was no conflict because everyone was friendly.
sentences.zh: 她感觉到许多人的存在，但没有冲突，因为每个人都很友好。

words.eng_def: the state of being in a place

sentences.en: The entire park was full of energy, and the artist used a quick brush to create her painting.
sentences.zh: 整个公园充满活力，艺术家用快速的画笔创作了她的画。

words.eng_def: fast; happening in a short time

sentences.en: She used a net to catch some leaves for her art, and a secretary helped her organize the materials.
sentences.zh: 她用网捕捉了一些树叶用于艺术创作，一位秘书帮她整理材料。

words.eng_def: a material with holes used to catch things
a person who helps with office work

sentences.en: The artist's defense of her work was strong because she believed in her ideas.
sentences.zh: 艺术家对自己作品的辩护很强烈，因为她相信自己的想法。

words.eng_def: the act of protecting or supporting something

sentences.en: A driver brought a big ball for a game, but the game changed because of a gas leak.
sentences.zh: 一个司机带来了一个大球用于游戏，但游戏因为煤气泄漏而改变了。

words.eng_def: a person who drives a vehicle
a round object used in games
a substance like air that burns

sentences.en: The cook had to spread the news about the danger, and everyone moved to a safe camp.
sentences.zh: 厨师不得不传播关于危险的消息，每个人都搬到了安全的营地。

words.eng_def: to make something go to more places
a place with tents or temporary buildings

sentences.en: The shift in plans was sudden, but the audience stayed calm.
sentences.zh: 计划的转变很突然，但观众保持冷静。

words.eng_def: a change in position or direction
a group of people who watch a show

sentences.en: The art festival had a nuclear theme, and the scale of the project was excellent.
sentences.zh: 艺术节有一个核主题，而且项目的规模非常棒。

words.eng_def: related to the center of an atom
the size or level of something

sentences.en: At the edge of the park, a child began to cry, but a friend came to lift her up.
sentences.zh: 在公园边缘，一个孩子开始哭泣，但一个朋友过来把她抱了起来。

words.eng_def: to make sounds because of sadness or pain

image_prompts: An artist sitting in a corner of a sunny park, painting on an easel, with a small crowd of people watching her.
A woman smiling while looking at many people around her, all friendly and peaceful, no conflict.
A wide view of a park full of energy, with an artist using a quick brush stroke on a large canvas.
An artist holding a net with colorful leaves, and a secretary with a clipboard helping organize materials on a table.
An artist standing confidently in front of her painting, with one hand raised, defending her ideas to a small group.
A driver getting out of a car holding a large ball, with a gas leak sign nearby and people looking worried.
A cook in a white hat shouting and pointing, with people moving towards tents (camp) in the background.
A stage with an audience sitting calmly, while a sign showing 'Plan Change' is being put up.
An art festival with a large nuclear symbol decoration, and a huge painting on a wall, with the word 'Excellent' on a banner.
A child sitting at the edge of a park crying, and a friend bending down to lift the child up.
